tagline: Sovereign API Monetization Gateway for the Agentic Economy
description: APEX is an Appchain on Initia that enables B2B API providers to monetize services with 100ms settlement finality using hardware-anchored trust and automated session-based payments.

initia_native_features.implementation_detail: Used to allow AI agents to execute high-frequency API calls without manual wallet intervention within a defined spending window.
Facilitates instant settlement of API fees by routing USDC/INIT liquidity from the Initia L1 to the APEX settlement layer.
Used for human-readable identification of API providers and verified agentic consumers.
